CheckTitle: 确保no 安全组s allow 入站流量 from the 互联网 to Cassandra ports TCP 7199, 9160 and 8888.
Description: 确保no 安全组s allow 入站流量 from the 互联网 to Cassandra ports TCP 7199, 9160 and 8888.
Risk: Exposing Cassandra ports to the 互联网 can allow 未授权访问 to 数据库 services and may lead to data disclosure, data loss or service compromise.

Recommendation.Text: Modify the 安全组 to remove 入站流量 rules that allow traffic from the 互联网 to TCP ports 7199, 9160 or 8888.
